title: Dataset QA Auditor
problem: ML datasets often ship with silent schema drift, label imbalance, and duplicated records that degrade model performance and are discovered only after training cycles are wasted.
solution: This auditor validates dataset snapshots against schema and distribution baselines, flags anomalies, and generates a release gate report with pass/fail recommendations and remediation steps.

impact.notes: Intended for data scientists and platform engineers; expected to prevent at least one failed training run per sprint.
